title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA full（第15部分）
content:
e need for such engagements.

Please refer to the University’s engagement of full-time student assistants using research grants. Transportation, Allowable Postage & Courier Services These include postage, courier and freight charges for bringing in equipment and / or specialised consumables meant for research purposes. Reimbursement of local transport for the purpose of carrying out their research works. Transport claims to be supported by meeting confirmation emails, if any and purpose of the trips. Admin fees incurred for payment of taxi fares via debit / credit cards are not allowed; PIs are to bear the full admin fees, if any. Visiting Students Allowable To request for approval from TL Director prior to inviting the visiting students. PIs are required to justify that the visiting students’ presence are necessary and relevant to the area of their research. The visiting students should be based locally (i. e. locals or studying in a local institution) and their remuneration will be based on Office of Human Resources (HR) guidelines. Volunteers and Allowable Research Patients For research involving human subjects, tissues, and / or personal data, PIs must seek approval from the University’s Institutional Review Board (IRB) before commencement of the research works. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 7 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: October 2017 Type of Expenses Description Payments to volunteers and research subjects should be relevant to the scope and studies of the research supported by the TL Research Grant. Please refer to the University’s policy on the use of human subjects, tissues, and / or personal data in SUTD Central under Office of Research Purchase of Equipment IT Equipment Allowable PIs to justify the need for a new computer equipment and it should only be used for the purpose of research and deemed essential to the project. Provide to the IT Assistant Director from Office of Information Technology (IT) with the quotation(s) obtained, get clearance and approval on the procurement before confirming the purchase. Approval from the Lead PI (if applicable) or TL Director is required too. All IT equipment will be considered as fixed asset (or Low Value Asset, depending on the cost of the item) under the University’s Fixed Assets (FA) Policy, an asset number will be assigned to the equipment and it should be affixed with the asset tag given by Office of Finance. Refer to the policy in SUTD Central under Office of Finance. Please refer to the University’s IT policy in SUTD Central under Office of Information Technology (IT). Purchase of Allowable PDAs, Mobile Phones, etc PIs to justify the need for a new computer equipment and it should only be used for the purpose of research and deemed essential to the project. Approval from the Lead PI (if applicable) or TL Director is required. All PDAs, tablets and mobile phones will be considered as fixed asset (or Low Value Asset, depending on the cost of the item) under the University’s Fixed Assets (FA) Policy, an asset number will be assigned to the equipment and it should be affixed with the asset tag given by Office of Finance. Refer to the policy in SUTD Central under Office of Finance.
